title: Software Update - DFU -  Complete screen
scenario: Firmware update via Device Settings > Software Update shows "Update complete" screen with 100% progress and returns to home screen on tapping Close
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, scroll down and tap on "Software Update".
4. If an update is available, tap "Update" to begin the firmware update process.
5. Wait for the firmware update to complete.
6. Observe the screen after the update finishes.
7. Tap the "Close" button on the "Update complete" screen.
expected: The "Update complete" screen is displayed with the progress bar at 100% and a message confirming the update was successful. After tapping "Close", the user is returned to the Home screen.
